rules: Headings (h1-h4) must use 'Manrope' font-family.
Headings size > 24px MUST use tight letter spacing: 'tracking-tight'.
Body text must use 'DM Sans'.
Overlines / Labels MUST be Uppercase + text-xs + Wide Spacing ('tracking-widest').
Line Height: Tight ('leading-none') for headers, Loose ('leading-relaxed') for body.
BANNED: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.

colors.strategy: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Soft Utility Dashboard. Clean, functional, and objective.
rules: Use primary color (Indigo) explicitly for primary CTAs, active states, and focus rings.
Use 'Tinted Grey' rule: Neutral greys are tinted with slight blue/indigo (e.g. hue 240) to feel alive.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use generic full-screen gradients. Dashboard color is for function and guidance only.

shadows: Use layered ambient shadows rather than harsh drop shadows.
Hover effect for dashboard cards: '-translate-y-1', 'shadow-lg', 'shadow-black/5' (light) or 'shadow-white/5' (dark).
glassmorphism: For sticky headers, navs, overlays: use 'bg-background/80', 'backdrop-blur-xl', 'border-b', 'border-border/40'.
CRITICAL: Do not use complete transparent backgrounds without a blur/scrim when content scrolls underneath.
borders: GRID BORDERS: Use subtle 1px 'border-border' to expose skeleton logic (e.g. calendar cells, separated dashboard widgets).

layouts.grid_strategy: High Density Grid (For Dashboards). Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4. Gap: tight (gap-4 or gap-6).
layouts.dashboard_anatomy: Fixed left sidebar (w-64) for main navigation. Main content area (flex-1). Collapsible right sidebar (w-72 or w-80) for the Task Planner / Upcoming events.
layouts.responsive: Mobile-First: Always start with 'grid-cols-1'. Hide sidebars on mobile, use bottom sheet or hamburger menu for navigation. Ensure PWA full-screen optimization.
layouts.calendar_grid: Month view uses pure 7-column CSS grid. Day/Week view uses fixed left-axis for time. Handle overflow gracefully with '+N more' indicators or popovers.
layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 or p-8 for main layout containers to let the high-density grid breathe.
rules: Mobile constraints: Images or big calendar grids MUST NOT exceed screen boundaries without proper scrolling.
Grid Children: Grid items MUST be direct children of the grid container.
Optical alignment: Use proper padding to visually center text near icons.

components.calendar: Custom UI built using 'date-fns' for logic. Use raw div/span structures styled with Tailwind. Dropdowns for View Selection (Month/Week/Day).
components.task_planner: Vertical dense list within the right sidebar. Custom checkboxes. Strike-through animation for completed tasks.
components.event_modal: Shadcn Dialog. Form inputs via Shadcn Input, Select, and Calendar for date-picking.
components.booking_link: Marketing-style public view. Focused center card. Clean typography. Easy time-slot selection.
components.navigation: Clean pill-shaped active states for sidebar links ('bg-primary/10 text-primary' or 'bg-muted').
components.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all standard UI icons.

rules: Micro-interactions on hover for all buttons/links (e.g., 'transition-colors duration-200').
Staggered entrance for task items in the planner.
Modals must use smooth Shadcn fade-in/zoom-in.
Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'.
Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text (WCAG AA).
Hover states must always explicitly set text/bg color (e.g. 'hover:bg-primary/90').
Focus States must have higher contrast ('focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-background').
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='calendar-day-15').

images.description: Elegant headshot of a professional woman in a black outfit, showcasing confidence and style.
Man in white shirt smiling against a grey background

rules: Use avatars for the 'Invite People' section, collaborative task planner list, and user profile header.
Always set 'object-cover' and 'rounded-full' on avatar images.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Replace frontend CSS: Overwrite index.css with the provided CSS variables and font imports (@import url for DM Sans & Manrope). Remove generic .App styling and centering from App.css.

2. Setup the Layout: Implement a global Dashboard Layout component with a fixed left navigation sidebar, flexible main content area, and a collapsible right sidebar for the Task Planner. Ensure mobile view hides sidebars into a hamburger menu and handles PWA safely.
3. Implement the Core Calendar: Build the Interactive Calendar view using 'date-fns'. Needs to support Monthly, Weekly, and Daily views. Toggle these views via a Shadcn Dropdown or Tabs.

4. Component Customization: Integrate Shadcn UI components (Dialog, Input, Select, Calendar, Tabs). Override default border radius to match the design (--radius: 0.75rem). Use flat, rectangular, dense styles.
5. Form & Modals: Build 'Create Event/Task modal' with 'Invite People' functionality. Use avatar images provided in the guidelines for invitees.
6. Booking Link: Create a shareable, Calendly-like 'Booking Link View'. Clean, uncluttered layout centered around availability selection.
7. Authentication: Build standard Google Auth + JWT Email/Password Login page. Use a sleek, minimalist split-screen or centered card design.
8. Testability: Rigorously enforce 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur-xl).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Missing categories (especially avatars) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN. Use the provided image_urls.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...). Pages MUST use default exports.
